minting_now.name: LE DRAGON DE L'ILE DE RHODES
minting_now.description:
My study on the legend of the dragon of Rhodes through the lens of Schiller's corresponding ballad "Der Kampf mit dem Drachen" from the first edition of the Book Le Dragon de l'île de Rhodes of 1829, by Retzsch.

" It  is so told ,that there was a dragon on the island of Rhodes in the  1330s, hiding

minting_now.name: Scarlet Tengu Guardian#003
minting_now.description:
A fearless guardian born from Japanese folklore and modern street culture.
Scarlet Tengu Guardian represents rebellion, protection, and untamed spirit.
The bold crimson mask, sharp black shadows, and electric turquoise accents create a powerful balance between tradition and urban energy.
This piece

minting_now.name: PERIWIG
minting_now.description:
Periwig is a collection in progress. This dNFT serves as a promotional preview
The figure wears an exaggerated, curly periwig in a vivid color tone, evoking the grandeur of aristocratic fashion from the 17th–18th century.

minting_now.name: Neon Soul Chronicles
minting_now.description:
Enter a world where the line between consciousness and code is blurred. Neon Soul: Genesis is a collection of unique, digitally-bred entities captured in the high-voltage streets of a near-future dystopia.

Each character features custom-generated traits, from neural-link goggles to experimental gli

minting_now.name: Apex Cat Yelling
minting_now.description:
🐾 In a world where noise equals power and silence means invisibility, a new elite crew rises — Apex Cats Yelling.

They don’t ask for attention. They take it.
These aren’t just cats.
They are archetypes of rebellion, style, and status.

minting_now.name: Aristocrat
minting_now.description: A surreal, aristocratic monkey figure stands at the center of a vibrant, dreamlike scene. Dressed in lavish, vintage-inspired attire with a top hat and ornate jewelry, the character exudes a sense of elegance and mystery. A golden clock embedded on its chest suggests themes of time, identity, and tr

minting_now.name: MPJUniverse "Positive Vibes Only-Let's Fly"
minting_now.description: An American Boy & Australian Girl, a love story that never was sadly. An art piece created on a romantic two night adventure(s) with two strangers that fell in love. This is a Digital Asset that was Created-Designed by M & J, "MPJ".

minting_now.name: Hollow Hill
minting_now.description:
It’s been a long time since I’ve felt this low. I can’t finish a new piece or plan ahead I feel stuck in a loop of sorrow and disappointment.
This isn’t who I am. I don’t like this version of me.

I’m starting small. Small wins, one by one, to move forward.

so here im gonna start again just like wh

minting_now.name: Hope Beyond Pain
minting_now.description:
This collection is not an art, it’s a story, a reality and a call for humanity.
2 weeks ago, a heartbreaking accident changed a woman’s life forever. She lost her husband and her little child in a bad accident and she herself is now fighting through severe spinal injuries.

upcoming.name: Spring Sea
upcoming.description: I photographed the cherry blossoms, imagining them as waves on the spring sea. I want to be swallowed and enveloped by these pink waves of happiness, and surrender myself to happiness without a care in the world.

Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
Happy National Anime Day!
